emails.subject: Re: Override Letter
emails.body: Re: Override Letter Mike hasn't sent the new assignment language. To my knowledge we had not discussed including it in this set of agreements, so he may have put it aside to work on the consent issues. Kay From: Roseann Engeldorf on 12/06/2000 08:52 AM

emails.subject: Re: Override Letter
emails.body: I forgot to add that the override letter needs 30.7 Third Party Beneficiary language also. Rob, would you put that in from the current Turbine Purchase Agreement? Thanks, Rose Kay Mann 12/06/2000 08:56 AM
